votes.rationale: Adds binding visibility at-a-glance to Panels Index and Coverage by summarizing provider/model + bound/unknown counts per panel. This makes drift and UNKNOWN slots obvious without clicking into each panel.
Low-risk UI/loader change. Uses existing model-slots manifest and does not change scoring or governance semantics. Improves operator auditability and debugging.
Unanimous consent satisfied; proceed to ratify. This completes the visibility loop by making slot bindings visible on list/coverage surfaces.
